rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies and provides specific fixes, walking the chain end-to-end.
rationale.RX.1: Discloses uncertainty for all claims that cannot be verified, including numerical results and citation strings.
rationale.RX.3: Flags every inconsistency and recommends detailed revisions to ensure scope adherence.
rationale.RX.4: Highlights potential downstream harms in terms of mischaracterization but does not introduce new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, though some minor details are missing.
